title: 6 INSANE Claude Cowork Use Cases to Save Hours (AI Workflow Automation)
summary: Video tutorial demonstrating six practical automation workflows using Claude Cowork, covering tasks like morning briefs, content generation, inbox management, research reports, dashboards, and desktop control. The content shows how to move beyond basic chatbot usage to systematic AI-driven workflow automation.
writeup: This tutorial walks through six automation workflows built with Claude Cowork: morning briefs, content generation, inbox management, research reports, dashboards, and desktop control. The framing moves past basic chatbot prompting toward systematic, agentic workflows that run multi-step tasks. The takeaway is a set of concrete templates for delegating recurring work to AI agents rather than handling each step manually.
